title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. Users can create designs using options for prototypes, slide decks, templates, and custom configurations, then download generated code for deployment.
